══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Chromatic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Chromatic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Chromatic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
→ Chromatic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster: CON save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 13 necrotic damage (half).
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 46/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
